Owners' equivalent rent of residences
projectionComponents.projectionSourceDetail: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average

projectionComponents.name: Owners' equivalent rent of primary residence
projectionComponents.projectionSourceDetail: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average

projectionComponents.name: Commodities less food and energy commodities
Nondurables less food, beverages, and apparel
Rent of primary residence
projectionComponents.projectionSourceDetail: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average

projectionComponents.name: Gasoline (all types)
projectionComponents.projectionSourceDetail: EIA weekly regular gasoline calendar-month average $4.050/gal vs prior $4.479/gal using 5 weekly prints

projectionComponents.name: New vehicles
projectionComponents.projectionSourceDetail: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average

projectionComponents.name: Used cars and trucks
projectionComponents.projectionSourceDetail: SETA02 SA model: rho 0.47 * prior CPI SA +0.10 pp + Manheim m2 signal -0.39 pp * volatility scale 0.71 + level gap z=-1.04, mean-reversion adj +0.02 pp; timing m0 2026-06 unavailable in Manheim feed; m2 2026-04 -1.56% pub 2026-05-07; omitted unavailable m0. Compared against CUSR0000SETA02; no asymmetry term kept. SA forecast converted to NSA using the component's historical SA/NSA offset.

projectionComponents.name: Electricity
projectionComponents.projectionSourceDetail: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average

projectionComponents.name: Tuition, other school fees, and childcare
Lodging away from home
projectionComponents.projectionSourceDetail: CoStar/STR ADR primary: 2026-06 weekly-derived $173.89 vs 2026-05 official $168.51 (+3.19%); 5 weekly prints, 0 carried days; pass-through +2.03%

projectionComponents.name: Other lodging away from home including hotels and motels
Water and sewer and trash collection services
Airline fares
projectionComponents.projectionSourceDetail: airfare fallback 5.29% plus guarded jet-fuel pass-through -2.74% from EIA Gulf Coast jet fuel calendar-month average $3.042/gal vs prior $3.943/gal using 21 daily prints

projectionComponents.name: Internet services and electronic information providers
Club membership for shopping clubs, fraternal, or other organizations, or participant sports fees

projectionComponents.projectionSourceDetail: free fallback: recent CPI-timed movement + same-month seasonal average

Chicken
projectionComponents.projectionSourceDetail: Commodity-complex mapping documented but dropped because it did not improve window-C error; using prior fallback. Candidate cuts: USDA chicken National composite whole bird, USDA chicken National composite WOGS, USDA chicken Boneless skinless breast, USDA chicken Leg quarters bulk, USDA chicken Whole wings

Cheese and related products
projectionComponents.projectionSourceDetail: Commodity-complex mapping documented but dropped because it did not improve window-C error; using prior fallback. Candidate cuts: USDA NDPSR Cheddar 40-pound blocks

projectionComponents.name: Uncooked beef steaks
projectionComponents.projectionSourceDetail: Commodity-complex mapping documented but dropped because it did not improve window-C error; using prior fallback. Candidate cuts: USDA boxed beef Choice primal Loin, USDA boxed beef Choice primal Rib, USDA boxed beef Choice/Select spread

projectionComponents.name: Uncooked ground beef
projectionComponents.projectionSourceDetail: BEEF commodity-complex factor: cuts USDA boxed beef Choice primal Chuck, USDA boxed beef Choice primal Round, USDA boxed beef Choice/Select spread; lag 0, loading 0.95; live cut adjustment 0.00 pp
